title: Pokémon Red Version and Pokémon Blue Version
edition_pinned: Pokémon Red Version Nintendo 3DS Virtual Console listing (2016 re-release; archived capture 2017-01-04), observed 2026-07-13; row describes the paired Pokémon Red and Blue Game Boy design released in North America in 1998, originating with Japan's 1996 Pocket Monsters Red/Green.
moat: Version-exclusive captures and type matchups turn party construction into both exploration and social exchange.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: A compact creature roster recombines capture, growth, elemental matchups, trading, and battles across one map.
exemplar_rationale: Makes collection itself a progression system whose missing pieces invite both exploration and competition.

evidence.claim: Archived Nintendo 3DS Virtual Console product page encoded data-genre="Role-Playing" for Pokémon Red Version.
